entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: The crop being studied for its susceptibility and resistance to the shoot fly

entities.name: ATHERIGONA SOCCATA
entities.description: The shoot fly, an important pest of sorghum

entities.name: HOST PLANT RESISTANCE
entities.description: An effective component for managing the shoot fly pest

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The location where sorghum hybrids based on milo cytoplasm are grown

entities.name: MILO CYTOPLASM
entities.description: Also known as A1 cytoplasm, a male-sterile cytoplasm highly susceptible to shoot fly

entities.name: CMS
entities.description: Cytoplasmic Male Sterility, used to develop hybrids in sorghum

entities.name: OVIPOSITION
entities.description: The process of egg-laying by the shoot fly on the host plant

entities.name: DEADHEART FORMATION
entities.description: A symptom of shoot fly damage characterized by the death of the central shoot

entities.name: MAINTAINER LINES
entities.description: Lines used to maintain the genetic purity of male-sterile lines

entities.name: MALE-STERILE LINES
entities.description: Lines that cannot produce functional pollen due to cytoplasmic factors

entities.name: A4M CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A male-sterile cytoplasm found to be relatively resistant to the shoot fly

entities.name: ANTIXENOSIS
entities.description: A resistance mechanism where the plant is non-attractive to the pest for oviposition

entities.name: A4G1 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A male-sterile cytoplasm that suffered lower deadhearts in tillers

entities.name: A3 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A male-sterile cytoplasm showing better recovery following shoot fly damage

entities.name: A2 CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A male-sterile cytoplasm showing better recovery following shoot fly damage

entities.name: RECOVERY
entities.description: The ability of the sorghum plant to recover after being damaged by the shoot fly

entities.name: LARVAL PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of the larval stage of Atherigona soccata

entities.name: PUPAL PERIOD
entities.description: The duration of the pupal stage of Atherigona soccata

entities.name: PUPAL WEIGHT
entities.description: The weight of the pupae of Atherigona soccata

entities.name: A4VZM CYTOPLASM
entities.description: A male-sterile cytoplasm that affects the larval and pupal development of the shoot fly

entities.name: FECUNDITY
entities.description: The reproductive capacity of the shoot fly on different sorghum lines

entities.name: ANTIBIOSIS
entities.description: A resistance mechanism that adversely affects the biology of the pest

entities.name: B-LINES
entities.description: Maintainer lines used in the CMS system

relationships.description: lower antibiosis indices on CMS lines
